layout_and_spacing.desktop_canvas: w-screen h-screen overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] relative selection:bg-[#FAFAFA] selection:text-[#0A0A0A]
layout_and_spacing.window_container: absolute bg-[#111111] border border-[#2E2E2E] shadow-[0_32px_64px_-16px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] flex flex-col overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.window_header: h-10 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-b border-[#2E2E2E] flex items-center justify-between px-4 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest
layout_and_spacing.editor_grid: flex-1 grid grid-cols-[64px_1fr_240px] grid-rows-[1fr_200px] gap-px bg-[#2E2E2E] overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.editor_sidebar: bg-[#111111] h-full flex flex-col p-2 gap-2 border-r border-[#2E2E2E]
layout_and_spacing.editor_properties: bg-[#111111] h-full flex flex-col p-4 gap-4 border-l border-[#2E2E2E] overflow-y-auto
layout_and_spacing.editor_canvas_wrapper: bg-[#141414] relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-auto
layout_and_spacing.timeline: col-span-3 bg-[#111111] border-t border-[#2E2E2E] flex flex-col

components.button_primary: px-4 py-2 text-sm font-mono tracking-wide transition-colors bg-[#FAFAFA] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#D4D4D8] disabled:opacity-50
components.button_secondary: px-4 py-2 text-sm font-mono tracking-wide transition-colors border border-[#2E2E2E] text-[#FAFAFA] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:border-[#FAFAFA]
components.tool_button: w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center border border-transparent hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded transition-all data-[active=true]:bg-[#FAFAFA] data-[active=true]:text-[#0A0A0A]
components.dock: fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex gap-4 p-3 bg-[#111111]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-[#2E2E2E] rounded shadow-2xl z-50
components.color_swatch: w-6 h-6 rounded-sm border border-[#2E2E2E] cursor-pointer hover:scale-110 transition-transform data-[active=true]:border-[#FAFAFA]

interaction_and_motion.drag_drop: Use pure HTML5 Drag/Drop or Framer Motion 'drag' for the fake OS windows. Do NOT use standard center alignments. Windows should spawn staggered.
interaction_and_motion.hover_states: Crisp transitions. Text goes from gray to white. Backgrounds go from #111111 to #1A1A1A.
interaction_and_motion.sprite_follower: Sprite must follow cursor using a `requestAnimationFrame` lerp loop for smooth trailing. Different states (drag, resize) trigger different sprite sheet offsets/animations. It MUST ignore pointer events (pointer-events-none) and live at a massive z-index.
interaction_and_motion.focus_states: High contrast 2px solid white outline on focus. No soft glows.

images.description: Abstract dark geometric pattern for the OS background. Blend it with a CSS radial gradient dot overlay.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Swiss architecture means absolute legibility. Text on #111111 must be at least #888888 (min 4.5:1).
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All tools, timeline frames, and window controls MUST have `data-testid`.

instructions_to_main_agent.philosophy: This is E1's design. Do NOT use soft SaaS blobs, teal gradients, or rounded-3xl corners. Use 1px sharp borders, structural grids, and functional minimalism. Tension is created by the messy pixel art existing inside a rigid, high-contrast, perfectly aligned Swiss container.
instructions_to_main_agent.desktop_engine: Implement a `DesktopContext` managing a list of open windows, their z-index, position (x,y), and size. Provide dragging handles on headers. The quick-launch dock toggles the visibility of the Settings and Sprite Editor apps.
instructions_to_main_agent.sprite_editor_engine: Use HTML5 `<canvas>` for drawing to prevent massive DOM overhead from grid cells. State must manage: Frames[], CurrentFrame, FPS, IsPlaying, OnionSkin (bool), CurrentTool (pencil, eraser, fill, picker). Implement a live preview window component that loops over the frames at the given FPS.
instructions_to_main_agent.css_background: Add a faint dot grid to the desktop using CSS: `background-image: radial-gradient(#2E2E2E 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 24px 24px;`
